subject: Mudsdale — a large, muscular draft horse Pokemon with a heavy coat and thick mud-encrusted lower legs
description: A large, powerfully built horse Pokemon dominates the frame in a dynamic stance. The body is dark-coated and heavily muscled, with a thick hanging mane. The lower legs are notably thickened and coated, suggesting the hardened mud the species is known for. The creature stands on rocky or earthen ground and appears to be in motion or braced for impact. The background suggests an outdoor setting with warm tones — earthy browns and oranges. The overall impression is one of raw physical power and endurance. The palette is dark browns, warm oranges, and muted earth tones.
emotion: powerful and unstoppable; braced strength with forward momentum
